'''Atin Attan''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who was a member of the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School's]] [[Twilight Class]] who later joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
A pilot since her childhood, Attan studied Sullustan geology from [[SoroSuub Extension]] programs. After graduating, she joined the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], and was a member of the prestigious [[Twilight Class]]. Attan led one of the most dangerous parts of the final trek that led to the impressive graduation of the Twilight Class around [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]].

After that, Attan joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] alongside most of the other members of the Twilight Class. She became a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Instructor/Legends|instructor]] for the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Attan was assigned to the [[Roche asteroid field]], where she helped in some minor modifications to the prototype [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]].
